{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113372887E4655ED27D5658CC67"}"},"total":272},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7497491319969661721","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看的书。终于有让太子有好结局的书了。或许太子继位那些经才绝艳的王爷们才有好结果。必竟他是名正言顺的啊。意难平平了。真好","text_exts":[{"e":56,"s":53,"text":"意难平","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%84%8F%E9%9A%BE%E5%B9%B3&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740714485658CC67%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227497491319969661721%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227424955474463689753%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%84%8F%E9%9A%BE%E5%B9%B3%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745652268,"group_id":"7424955474463689753","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2JEZKUfS2A5WEGBkpK7UrBxAtTj3ir1z7n6l7c45Mcu","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616050&x-signature=DrAQG0h3j%2BuZjDoa%2FpIJp7vPNFs%3D","user_id":"2129074078632720","user_name":"喜欢发菜的林霆鹤"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2129074078632720","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7424955474463689753","book_info":{"abstract":"现代人尹佑遭遇车祸，在死后重生为康熙第七子胤祐。他生而有疾，母妃也不得宠，胤祐在后宫生存的秘诀就是给自己立个不争不抢的人设。
在胤祐人设的作用下，康熙认为他孝悌忠信，太子把他当成最亲近的兄弟，就连未来的雍正也夸他宠辱不惊，性情至真，是个值得信任的人。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/71659a6a994aaa664c887864938346f0","author":"芒果不加酱","author_id":"","book_id":"7424955474463689753","book_name":"清穿之七阿哥的奋斗人生","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4321人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1139,"name":"古风世情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1139&name=古风世情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1317,"name":"古言权谋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1317&name=古言权谋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7434917594219430424","read_count":"4321","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"500110"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"226","tags":"古风世情,古言权谋,古代言情,穿越,HE","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b293b225c6f00ab1da8af984f6a049e0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255448&x-signature=kjGmQfNTJbruUbJNARkTW2XGrKY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2089495818143191","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"245"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113372887E4655ED27D5658CC67"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":51,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3946,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":39415,"reply_count":0,"
